payload.notes: PR #48 Linux premerge failed because write_new passes u16 to rustix::fs::Mode::from_bits_truncate, whose Linux bits type is u32. Treat as a Phase 3 acceptance correction; do not open Phase 4 until Linux proof passes.
payload.summary: Restore Linux compilation and premerge validity for accepted V1 Phase 3 recovery

payload.evidence: Reopened by PR #48 Linux premerge failure at crates/harness-core/src/recovery.rs:1785: rustix::fs::Mode expects Linux u32 bits but write_new supplies u16. Prior macOS-local and isolated-tree acceptance remains historical evidence; current candidate must restore Linux compilation and rerun Phase 1-3 plus full premerge before Phase 4 opens.

payload.actions_taken: ["diagnose PR #48 Ubuntu failure","reopen US-108","delegate isolated correction","cross-compile Linux target","run full macOS premerge","reject first clippy-failing candidate","review target-native RawMode fix","integrate reviewed correction"]
payload.decisions_made: ["Treat the CI failure as relevant Phase 3 acceptance evidence","Use rustix::fs::RawMode instead of casts or Into conversion","Keep Phase 4 closed until the correction passed independent review"]
payload.errors: ["Original u16 mode failed Linux rustix compilation","Rejected mode.into() candidate failed macOS clippy::useless_conversion","Default bootstrap rejected stale Symphony-owned root harness.db"]
payload.harness_friction: Ubuntu CI exposed a target-width compile defect missed by prior macOS acceptance. The first agent correction passed Linux check but failed macOS Clippy; independent orchestration verification caught it and drove a target-native RawMode correction. Default bootstrap also rejected stale Symphony-owned root state, so the established isolated refactor-plan database was required.
payload.notes: Reviewed writer candidate c9b3d99 and integrated it as 0d0abdd. Linux x86_64 cross-target cargo check and full macOS scripts/validate-premerge.sh passed independently. Reviewer found no findings; no push performed.
payload.task_summary: Closed PR #48 Linux compilation defect for V1 Phase 3 recovery

payload.description: Independent verification rejected the first mode.into() candidate because macOS Clippy failed with useless_conversion; the writer replaced it with target-native rustix::fs::RawMode and both Linux cross-target compilation and full macOS premerge passed.
payload.impact: Prevented a second invalid Phase 3 acceptance and produced one target-native correction with no permission or recovery behavior change.

payload.evidence: PR #48 exposed a valid Linux compile defect in the accepted Phase 3 candidate. Corrected commit 0d0abdd changes write_new mode from fixed u16 to rustix::fs::RawMode. Independent x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu cargo check passed; full macOS scripts/validate-premerge.sh passed including 89 harness-core tests, Phase 1 9/9, Phase 2 11/11, Phase 3 11/11, workspace clippy -D warnings, installer, coherence, and release checks. Sol/high reviewer found no correctness or security findings. Ubuntu runtime CI remains to rerun after authorized push.
